svg.title: Synalux POS — employees
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for employees. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Role-based permissions | PIN auth | Timeclock | Schedules -- pos_employees / pos_roles
Payroll export: CSV / ADP / Gusto integration
Encrypted in DB -- never stored plaintext
Roles define all permission gates below -- customize per-employee overrides
pos_role_permissions table -- all permission checks server-side via Supabase RLS
Synalux POS | Employees | All permissions via pos_role_permissions RLS -- no hardcodes
